query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM estabelecimentos) as estabelecimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM convenios) as convenios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM arquivos) as arquivos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM procedimentos) as procedimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comparacoes) as comparacoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recursosGlosa) as recursos_glosa,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as usuarios;
